title: CCDelics Collapsing Caves
description: This mod adds natural cave-in events while mining with varying magnitudes of disaster.
body:
#

CCDelics Collapsing Caves 🪨⛏️

![Fabric API required for this mod banner.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d96e9beaeabbdb44f8e9cb17214f96decc4716b7_0.webp) # The **Collapsing Caves** mod adds natural cave-in events when mining in Minecraft!
![Gif of a cave collapsing around player.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2690348148d2afa28db9e760e58a431df5d94a2f.gif) ![Player standing beneath cave in about to be crushed with red circle that says "he's cooked" over him.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2940109a6e05b5c01b12188c1e4bb213859720f_0.webp)
The purpose of this mod is to add a little more danger to caving, and who doesn't love a little bit of random world events to spice things up?
The cave-ins **DO NOT** effect player-placed blocks, so you can protect yourself by building fast enough.
I don't recommend trying to run.
There are **five types** of cave-ins: **Small**, **Medium**, **Large**, **Enormous** and **Gargantuan**.
These types dictate how many block layers a cave in effects, how wide the radius is and how long it will last. #
### Credits: ⭐ Made by [CCDelic](https://modrinth.com/user/ccdelic) for Fabric 1.21.11. Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).
This mod was inspired by the [Cave-Ins Data Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cave-ins) by [Lettooce](https://modrinth.com/user/Lettooce).

![The minecraft head of the mod author, CCDelic.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a7b9bc354075663e2f489f6f42afdb2787a3afb.png)
